underlying_goal: Investigate why specific ads were throwing a verification form error in production, understand the root cause, and implement a fix
friction_detail: Claude initially gave an incorrect explanation about when the error fires (files saved vs not), had to self-correct after user questioned it.
brief_summary: User needed to investigate production verification form errors for specific ads, Claude traced the root cause through code and database, and implemented a fix to silently handle non-matching form fields.
